notes: Captures live giftCardUpdate behavior for explicit null note, expiresOn, and templateSuffix inputs against a gift card with populated values.
Shopify accepts each null-valued editable key, clears the corresponding nullable field, returns empty userErrors, and read-after-write returns null for all cleared fields.
Setup creates one disposable gift card with known editable fields; cleanup deactivates the setup gift card.

setup.label: clearNullableCardCreate

clear.label: updateClearNullable

readAfterClear.label: readAfterClear

cleanup.label: cleanupDeactivate:clearNullableCard
